overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a rural railway station at night. The scene depicts a dynamic weather transition as dense fog and storm clouds roll across the landscape, progressively obscuring the tracks, wooden station building, and surrounding terrain until visibility is nearly zero.

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint slowly panning right and upward across the quiet railway station

entered.detail: gravel ballast railway tracks running horizontally across the foreground
tall black lamppost with bright white light illuminating the platform
two-story wooden railway station with New Hanover signage and lit windows
simple wooden fence running parallel to the tracks
utility wires stretching across the dark sky
dark silhouetted hills with scattered lights visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: A quiet night at a rural railway station, with gravel tracks, a glowing street lamp, and a wooden station building visible against a dark cloudy sky. The camera pans slowly right and upward, revealing distant hills and scattered lights while maintaining clear visibility of the platform area.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway station engulfed in heavy storm fog

events.description: dense fog rolls in from the right, rapidly reducing visibility across the landscape
street lamp becomes enveloped in thick fog, creating a bright diffuse halo effect

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint continuing to pan as heavy fog engulfs the scene

entered.detail: thick white fog bank rolling in from the right, obscuring the background

segments.scene_description: Heavy fog and storm clouds engulf the railway station, rapidly reducing visibility until the wooden building fades into the whiteout. The street lamp transforms from a clear point of light into a diffuse glowing orb as the fog thickens, eventually becoming the only visible element in a sea of gray.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet rural railway station that is gradually consumed by a dense, blinding fog. It begins with a slow pan right and upward across gravel tracks and a wooden station building, revealing distant hills and scattered lights under a dark, cloudy sky. As the camera moves, heavy storm clouds and thick mist rapidly roll in, causing the station architecture to fade into a whiteout. The scene then shifts as the clear light of the street lamp transforms into a diffuse, glowing orb, eventually becoming the sole visible element within a featureless sea of gray.
